childhood.familyBackground: Born 1969. Son of prominent banking family. Great-grandfather Alfredo Egydio de Souza Aranha founded Banco Itaú.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1969년생. 저명한 은행 가족의 아들. 고조부 Alfredo Egydio de Souza Aranha가 Banco Itaú 설립.
childhood.earlyLife: Parents died in plane crash in 1982 when he was 13; raised by aunt Maria de Lourdes. Continued family banking tradition.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 13세 때 1982년 부모가 비행기 추락으로 사망; 고모 Maria de Lourdes에 의해 양육. 가족 은행 전통 계속.

careerTimeline.event: Great-grandfather founded Banco Itaú establishing banking dynasty
careerTimeline.eventKo: 고조부가 Banco Itaú 설립, 은행 왕조 확립

careerTimeline.event: Parents died in plane crash; raised by aunt; maintained family holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 부모가 비행기 추락으로 사망; 고모에게 양육; 가족 자산 유지

careerTimeline.event: Took leadership role in Itausa Investimentos managing $500B+ in assets
careerTimeline.eventKo: Itausa Investimentos에서 리더십 역할, 500억 달러 이상 자산 관리

careerTimeline.event: Chairman of Itausa with control over Itau Unibanco and multiple subsidiaries
careerTimeline.eventKo: Itausa 회장, Itau Unibanco 및 여러 자회사 통제

personalTraits.knownFor: Leading Itausa conglomerate, Itau Unibanco stewardship, banking family legacy management
personalTraits.knownForKo: Itausa 재벌 리더십, Itau Unibanco 관리, 은행 가족 유산 관리
